description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named debian-unstable:hungry-penguins that runs in the default test stage using the debian:unstable Docker image. The job should execute scripts/ci_before_script.sh in before_script, then run scripts/ci_script.sh as its main script, and finally run scripts/ci_after_script.sh in after_script. No stages, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
